nexus 0.2.0.9000
  • Get started

  • Changelog

Function reference

Compositional Data

as_amounts()
Coerce to Amounts
as_composition()
Coerce to a Closed Compositional Matrix
as_features()
Coerce to Features

Operations in the Simplex

`%perturbe%` `%power%`
Operations in the Simplex
closure()
Closure Operation
perturbation()
Perturbation Operation
powering()
Powering Operation
scalar()
Scalar Product

Log-ratio

transform_alr()
Additive Log-Ratios (ALR)
transform_clr()
Centered Log-Ratios (CLR)
transform_ilr()
Isometric Log-Ratios (ILR)
transform_inverse()
Inverse Log-Ratio Transformation
transform_lr()
Pairwise Log-Ratios (LR)
transform_plr()
Pivot Log-Ratios (PLR)

Statistics

aggregate(<CompositionMatrix>)
Compute Summary Statistics of Data Subsets
condense()
Compositional Mean of Data Subsets
covariance()
Covariance Matrix
dist(<CompositionMatrix>)
Distances
mahalanobis(<CompositionMatrix>) mahalanobis(<ILR>)
Mahalanobis Distance
margin()
Marginal Compositions
mean(<CompositionMatrix>)
Compositional Mean
metric_var() metric_sd()
Metric Variance and Standard Deviation
quantile(<CompositionMatrix>)
Sample Quantiles
scale(<CompositionMatrix>)
Scaling and Centering of Compositional Data
variation()
Variation Matrix

Data Summary

describe(<CompositionMatrix>)
Data Description

Visualization

as_graph()
Graph of Log-ratios
barplot(<CompositionMatrix>)
Barplot of Compositional Data
hist(<CompositionMatrix>)
Histogram of Compositional Data
plot(<CompositionMatrix>,<missing>)
Plot Compositional Data
plot(<LogRatio>,<missing>)
Plot Log-Ratios

Missing Values

missing
Missing Values Policy
replace_NA(<CompositionMatrix>)
Missing Values Replacement
replace_zero(<CompositionMatrix>)
Zero-Replacement

Outlier Detection

outliers()
Outlier Detection
plot(<OutlierIndex>,<missing>)
Plot Outliers

Multivariate Analysis

pca(<CompositionMatrix>) pca(<LogRatio>)
Principal Components Analysis

Provenance Tools

mix()
Mixed-Mode Analysis

Getters and Setters

any_assigned() is_assigned() get_groups() `set_groups<-`()
Working With Groups
any_replicated() is_replicated() get_samples() `set_samples<-`()
Working With Samples
split(<CompositionMatrix>) split(<LogRatio>)
Divide into Groups
`[`(<CompositionMatrix>,<missing>,<missing>,<missing>) `[`(<CompositionMatrix>,<missing>,<missing>,<logical>) `[`(<CompositionMatrix>,<index>,<missing>,<missing>) `[`(<CompositionMatrix>,<index>,<missing>,<logical>) `[`(<CompositionMatrix>,<missing>,<index>,<missing>) `[`(<CompositionMatrix>,<missing>,<index>,<logical>) `[`(<CompositionMatrix>,<index>,<index>,<missing>) `[`(<CompositionMatrix>,<index>,<index>,<logical>) `[[`(<OutlierIndex>,<index>,<ANY>) `[<-`(<CompositionMatrix>) `[[<-`(<CompositionMatrix>)
Extract or Replace Parts of an Object
get_totals() `set_totals<-`()
Row Sums

Datasets

arctic
Arctic Lake
chemistry
Can Sora Chemical Data
hongite
Hongite Mineralogy
petrography
Can Sora Petrographic Data
slides
Thin Sections

On this page

nexus is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau, Anne Philippe, , .

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
